topicOverview: An in-depth deep dive into Sensors. Mastering this is critical for passing technical interviews for IoT Engineer roles.
whyItMatters: Sensors is a core foundation of modern engineering. Interviewers use it as a proxy to test your deeper understanding of systems, performance, and best practices.
examples: Implementing Sensors in a real-world scenario
practiceQuestions: Fix the bug in the given Sensors snippet.
interviewQuestions: What are the pros and cons of Sensors?
How does Sensors handle memory management?
